service:
KhompStack-FreeSWITCH Khomp Stack FreeSWITCH Khomp Stack local PBX service __INSTALL_ROOT__\freeswitch\FreeSwitchConsole.exe -c -base "__INSTALL_ROOT__\freeswitch" -conf "__PROGRAM_DATA_ROOT__\config\freeswitch" -log "__FREESWITCH_STATE_ROOT__\logs" -db "__FREESWITCH_STATE_ROOT__\db" -run "__FREESWITCH_STATE_ROOT__\run" -mod "__INSTALL_ROOT__\freeswitch\mod" -htdocs "__INSTALL_ROOT__\freeswitch\htdocs" -scripts "__PROGRAM_DATA_ROOT__\config\freeswitch\scripts" -temp "__FREESWITCH_STATE_ROOT__\temp" __INSTALL_ROOT__\freeswitch __FREESWITCH_STATE_ROOT__\service-logs
